untranslatable_reason: Signal requires cointegration eigenvector weights, portfolio log market value construction, 5-day moving average deviation normalized by 5-day standard deviation, and dynamic position sizing based on cointegration analysis. These multivariate statistical constructs and custom portfolio-level calculations are not expressible using single-indicator comparisons. The strategy operates on derived cointegrated portfolio metrics rather than raw price/technical indicators.
translation_notes: This is a sophisticated multivariate mean-reversion strategy that cannot be adequately translated into the single-indicator rule format. The core logic involves: (1) constructing a cointegrated long-short portfolio using eigenvector weights, (2) computing deviations of portfolio log market value from its 5-day MA, (3) normalizing by 5-day volatility, and (4) sizing positions proportionally. The allowed indicator set lacks portfolio-level constructs, eigenvalue decomposition, and cross-asset cointegration metrics required to implement this strategy faithfully.
